title: Aureline merge validation-hint vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the merge_validation_hint_record family frozen in docs/vcs/merge_and_conflict_contract.md. One merge_validation_hint_record pins one validation hint emitted against a conflict_resolution_session_record (hint_class drawn from the closed ten-value vocabulary covering unresolved markers, dropped unknown keys, regenerate-input drift, cell-identity collision, output-payload modification outside cell-aware view, silent binary byte diff, evidence-modification attempts, lossy text-fallback paired with structured artifact, unverified external-tool round-trip, and recovery-object drift; severity drawn from the closed three-value vocabulary info_advisory_no_block, warning_user_must_review, blocking_must_resolve_before_merge_complete; lifecycle drawn from the closed four-value vocabulary hint_open_unacknowledged, hint_acknowledged_advisory_only, hint_resolved, hint_archived_tombstone). One audit stream (merge_validation_hint) carries the closed denial-reason and event-id vocabularies. blocking_must_resolve_before_merge_complete hints prevent merge-complete admission until the hint flips to hint_resolved or is downgraded by an explicit waiver review on the audit stream. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw notebook output bytes, raw generator argv, raw secrets, and raw lockfile / SBOM bodies MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema. The eventual git-service crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, hint class, severity class, lifecycle state, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps merge_validation_hint_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

merge_validation_hint_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the merge-validation-hint vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under.

merge_validation_hint_class.description: Frozen merge-validation-hint vocabulary. unresolved_marker_remaining covers leftover unresolved markers in a plain text or structured surface. unknown_key_dropped_or_renamed covers a structured-config or notebook key that the resolution would drop without round-trip survival. regenerate_input_drifted_from_pin covers a regenerate-first row whose canonical input no longer matches the pin recorded at session admission. cell_identity_collision_unstable covers notebook conflicts where two cells share an unstable id. output_payload_modified_outside_cell_aware_view covers notebook output edits that bypassed the cell-aware view. binary_payload_silent_byte_diff_detected covers a binary row where the resolution surface attempted a byte merge anyway. evidence_packet_modification_attempted covers an evidence-immutable row where a write was attempted. text_fallback_lossy_paired_with_structured_artifact covers a structured-config row where the user opted into a lossy raw-text view. external_tool_round_trip_unverified covers an external-tool handoff row whose returned artifact has not yet been verified through the round-trip corpus. validation_hint_recovery_object_drifted covers a session whose recovery object pin drifted between admission and merge-complete.

merge_validation_hint_severity_class.description: Frozen severity vocabulary. blocking_must_resolve_before_merge_complete prevents merge-complete admission until the hint flips to hint_resolved or is downgraded by an explicit waiver review on the audit stream (denies with merge_complete_blocked_pending_blocking_validation_hint).

merge_validation_hint_lifecycle_state.description: Frozen hint lifecycle vocabulary. hint_open_unacknowledged is the default at mint. hint_acknowledged_advisory_only is reachable only when the hint is info_advisory_no_block or warning_user_must_review. hint_resolved is reachable for every severity but requires an explicit waiver-review event on the audit stream when the severity is blocking_must_resolve_before_merge_complete.

merge_validation_hint_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the merge_validation_hint audit stream.

merge_validation_hint_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the merge_validation_hint stream. merge_validation_hint_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a merge_validation_hint_denial_reason.

conflict_resolution_session_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the conflict_resolution_session_record this hint was emitted against. Always non-null; a hint that omits the session ref denies with validation_hint_session_ref_required.

resolved_at.description: Required (non-null) when merge_validation_hint_lifecycle_state is hint_resolved. Null otherwise.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when merge_validation_hint_lifecycle_state is hint_archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

waiver_review_event_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the waiver-review audit event recorded on the merge_validation_hint stream. Required (non-null) when merge_validation_hint_severity_class is blocking_must_resolve_before_merge_complete and merge_validation_hint_lifecycle_state is hint_resolved (denies with validation_hint_resolution_requires_waiver_review_for_blocking_severity); null otherwise.

allOf.description: hint_resolved MUST cite a non-null resolved_at and null archived_at.
hint_archived_tombstone MUST cite a non-null archived_at.
hint_open_unacknowledged and hint_acknowledged_advisory_only MUST cite null resolved_at and null archived_at.

blocking_must_resolve_before_merge_complete severity is forbidden from hint_acknowledged_advisory_only (denies with validation_hint_acknowledged_advisory_forbidden_for_blocking_severity); hint_resolved at this severity MUST cite a non-null waiver_review_event_record_id_ref (denies with validation_hint_resolution_requires_waiver_review_for_blocking_severity).

merge_validation_hint_record.description: Row shape consumed by the merge surface, the resolution session, the change-stack panel, the source-control panel, and the support / export bundle. Exactly one row per validation-hint identity.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is merge_validation_hint_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

merge_validation_hint_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the merge_validation_hint stream.
